data.title: An ETH whale urgently deposited 2 million USDC with Hyperliquid to avoid liquidation.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an ETH whale urgently deposited 2 million USDC into Hyperliquid to avoid liquidation. The whale currently holds 20,000 ETH, worth $50.82 million, with a liquidation price of $1,994.24.

data.title: Understanding the Peak of Happiness During Festive Seasons
data.description: Crypto KOL @roger73005305 posted on X. People often experience the greatest happiness when they are on the verge of achieving it, similar to the anticipation felt on Friday afternoons compared to Sunday evenings. The true essence of celebrating the New Year lies in the days leading up to it, during the journey home, shopping for festive goods with family, and the night before New Year's Eve. Once the New Year has passed, the sense of happiness tends to diminish.

data.title: Huang Licheng Faces Significant Losses in ETH and HYPE Trades
data.description:
On January 31, Huang Licheng, also known as 'Brother Machi,' experienced a complete liquidation of his ETH and HYPE long positions, resulting in a loss of approximately $210,000. According to BlockBeats, this adds to a total loss of $1.57 million recorded over the past week.

Following the liquidation, Huang promptly reopened a position, initiating a $510,000 ETH long position at an opening price of $2,533.72.

data.title: High Leverage ETH Position Opened by Investor
data.description: Hyperbot data reveals that a prominent investor has opened a 25x leverage long position on Ethereum. According to Odaily, the current position holds 200 ETH with a liquidation price set at $2,471.

data.title: XRP Extends Death Cross as Price Hits 90-Day Low
data.description:
XRP is facing a steep death cross in what appears as a rare price reset for the coin.
source: https://u.today/xrp-extends-death-cross-as-price-hits-90-day-low

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin's drop below the $81,000 mark may be due to factors such as insufficient liquidity over the weekend amplifying selling pressure.
data.description: Bitcoin prices fell below $81,000 due to weak market liquidity over the weekend, amplifying selling pressure. Market participants also pointed to tensions in the Middle East, uncertainty surrounding the US government shutdown, and cautious sentiment within the crypto market as factors collectively weighed on risk assets. Data shows that Bitcoin prices fell approximately 2.2% in the past 24 hours. Weekend trading volumes typically decrease, making prices more susceptible to rapid fluctuations. The market remains range-bound, with traders watching to see if Bitcoin can attract new buying in the $80,000-$82,000 range. Otherwise, if weekend selling pressure continues, prices may decline further. (CoinDesk)

data.title: A whale deposited 6 million USDC into Hyperliquid half an hour ago, and subsequently placed buy orders for BTC and HYPE.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, address 0xd90…2D975 deposited 6 million USDC into Hyperliquid half an hour ago, and subsequently placed two buy orders: BTC: buy 73.46 coins (approximately $5 million) when the price fell to the [$60,555 - $75,555] range; HYPE: buy 100,000 coins (approximately $1.77 million) when the price fell to the [$15 - $20.38] range.

data.title: Ethereum's Market Cap Falls Below Top 50 Global Assets Amid Price Decline
data.description: Ethereum has experienced a significant drop in its market capitalization, according to ChainCatcher. Recent data from 8MarketCap reveals that the cryptocurrency's market cap has fallen seven places in the global asset rankings, now positioned at 56th, trailing behind companies like Coca-Cola. The market value of Ethereum has decreased to approximately $304.06 billion, with a 24-hour decline of 8.62% and a seven-day drop of 14.71%.

data.title: Frequent Liquidations Impact Account Balance
data.description: Recent reports indicate that an account has experienced multiple liquidations over the past six hours, significantly affecting its balance. According to PANews, the account has been liquidated 14 times within this period, leaving a remaining balance of $20,815. Overall, the account has faced liquidation a total of 241 times.

data.title: Maji Dage Faces Multiple Liquidations in Six Hours
data.description: Maji Dage has experienced 14 liquidations in the past six hours, according to Odaily. The account balance now stands at $20,815, with a total of 241 liquidations recorded.

data.title: The liquidation price of ETH positions held by Trend Research, a subsidiary of Yi Lihua, was approximately $1558, with a borrowing position health score of 1.34.
data.description: According to on-chain data monitoring, Trend Research, under Yi Lihua, currently has 175,800 WETH staked on Aave V3, worth approximately $445 million, and has lent out approximately 274 million USDT, with a lending position health index of 1.34. Margin can still be replenished during market downturns; yesterday, Trend Research withdrew a total of 109 million USDT from Binance and deposited it into Aave to reduce the risk of Ethereum position liquidation.

data.title: XRP Tests Structure, Not Collapse, as Fibonacci History Repeats
data.description:
XRP is trading near $1. 7 on the monthly timeframe, where price is interacting with a structurally important zone defined by long-term cycle behavior rather than short-term volatility. According to analysis shared by EGRAG CRYPTO, the current phase mirrors earlier market cycles, placing XRP at a decision point between continuation and structural failure
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-tests-structure-not-collapse-as-fibonacci-history-repeats/

data.title: Nigerian law enforcement nabs operator of fake crypto investment
data.description:
The Nigerian Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC) has arrested a suspected operator of a fake cryptocurrency investment platform. According to the Nigerian law enforcement, the suspect used his platform, Polyfarm, to target Nigerians on a large scale, defrauding them of their hard-earned funds. The arrest and handover of the suspect were disclosed by Nigeria’s […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/nigerian-law-enforcement-nabs-operator-of-fake-crypto-investment/

data.title: Brother Machi has been liquidated 14 times in the past 6 hours, leaving him with only $20,815 in his account.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, Machi Big Brother has been liquidated 14 times in the past 6 hours, with a balance of only $20,815 left. It has been liquidated a total of 241 times.

data.title: How the New US Fed Chair Could Impact the Crypto Market
data.description:
Key Insights: It’s been a rough week for the crypto market, with headlines highlighting bearish outcomes amid an unfavorable macro environment. However, the market just got a positive headline. The US President Donald Trump reportedly appointed Kevin Warsh as the new Federal Reserve chairman
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2026/01/31/how-the-new-us-fed-chair-could-impact-the-crypto-market/

data.title: The "short-selling whale" that opened short positions after the 1011 flash crash reduced its holdings by 24,639.69 ETH in the past 20 minutes, worth approximately $62.88 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, the "whale that opened short positions after the 1011 flash crash" reduced its holdings by 24,639.69 ETH in the past 20 minutes, worth approximately $62.88 million. This is the first time it has been liquidated since it opened long positions on December 7, 2025, resulting in a substantial loss of over $14.0626 million. This may have affected ETH, which briefly fell to $2,510, with the 24-hour decline widening to 8%. Currently, it still holds long positions worth $577 million, with a floating loss of $133 million.

data.title: The "1011 Insider Whale" deposited 3,183 ETH, worth $8.04 million, into Binance.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the "1011 Insider Whale" deposited 3,183 ETH into Binance, worth approximately $8.04 million, and more may be deposited in the future.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 81,000 USDT with a 2.98% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 31, 2026, 14:42 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 81,000 USDT and is now trading at 80,948.640625 USDT, with a narrowed 2.98% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: In the past four hours, ETH liquidations reached $138 million, with total liquidations across the entire network reaching $333 million.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $333 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past 4 hours, including $327 million in long positions. In addition, $138 million in ETH positions were liquidated and approximately $74.6 million in BTC positions were liquidated.

data.title: The Bitcoin-to-gold ratio has fallen to a historic low, and the current buying window may be better than in 2017.
data.description: Data shows that Bitcoin's price relative to gold has fallen to a historic low. This indicator has repeatedly appeared near Bitcoin's market bottoms in the past, signifying Bitcoin's significant weakness relative to gold. However, this also leads some analysts to view the current market environment as a potential buying opportunity, superior to that before the start of the 2015-2017 bull market. Market analysts believe that long-term holders are absorbing recent selling pressure. As funds rotate between safe-haven and risk assets, some traders anticipate a possible inflow of funds from gold to Bitcoin starting in February. However, others caution that this rotation is not inevitable and requires observation of changes in the macroeconomic environment and market risk appetite. (Cointelegraph)
